required.label: Investigation
required.purpose: Turn bug reports or unclear engineering failures into root-cause issue plans.

required.label: Engineering Review
required.purpose: Review code, issue plans, and PRs for correctness, risks, missing tests, and architectural violations.

required.label: Implementation Delivery
required.purpose: Drive an issue through implementation, verification, and PR readiness.

optional.label: Quest Breakdown
optional.purpose: Break large delivery goals into ordered, non-overlapping execution quests.

optional.label: Debrief
optional.purpose: Capture what happened, why it happened, and what operational lesson should persist.
